data.title: Hyperliquid 25 times long ETH whale closed its position and made a profit of $5.19 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale closed a 25-fold long position in ETH, making a total profit of $5.19 million and withdrawing all funds from HyperLiquid. Previously, the whale deposited $4.3 million in Hyperliquid, and the value of the ETH long position once exceeded $75 million.

data.title: U.S. House Speaker supports Musk, calls him a friend
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Johnson, Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives: Musk is a friend. I sent him a lot of messages via text message. I hope he can read it. (Jinshi)

data.title: Yuga Labs CEO plans to dissolve ApeCoin DAO, saying it is a waste of resources
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Recently, Yuga Labs CEO Greg Solano proposed a plan to dissolve ApeCoin DAO and transfer its assets and responsibilities to ApeCo, a new entity created by Yuga Labs. Solano criticized that ApeCoin DAO "has evolved from a promise to a slow, noisy and unserious governance performance" and that resources were wasted on "vanity proposals and low-impact plans." The new entity will focus on supporting high-quality projects and strengthening the three core pillars of ApeChain, Bored Ape Yacht Club and Otherside. If the proposal is passed, ApeCoin holders will lose all governance rights. This move is part of Yuga Labs' strategic reorganization. The company has recently sold NFT project IPs such as Moonbirds and CryptoPunks to refocus on its core business. (Decrypt)

data.title: Tesla's stock price fell by more than $19.5 billion due to its falling out with Trump
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Due to the fallout between Musk and Trump, Tesla's stock price fell by more than 14%, and its market value shrunk by $153 billion, creating the largest single-day drop in history. Musk holds about 12.8% of Tesla's shares. As a result, the market value of these shares has shrunk by more than $19.5 billion.
According to Yahoo Finance data, Tesla's stock price after hours is now $286.99, a slight rebound.

data.title: Citadel Securities president warns US debt is a ticking time bomb
data.description:
Citadel’s president says US debt is very dangerous and could cause big problems.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/citadel-warns-us-debt-is-a-ticking-time-bomb/

data.title: Stablecoin Innovation Act Gains Bipartisan Support in U.S. Senate
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. 2025 Stablecoin National Innovation Guidance Act, also known as the GENIUS Act, is anticipated to receive significant bipartisan backing in the Senate. Democratic Senator Ruben Gallego has indicated that the bill incorporates several Democratic amendments and currently has the support of up to 16 Democratic senators. He emphasized that for the bill to effectively establish clear regulations, it must be accompanied by a complementary crypto market structure bill. The final vote on the GENIUS Act could take place as early as next week.

data.title: CITIC Securities: The favorable policy expectations for stablecoins are beneficial to the upward trend of cryptocurrencies, which are also affected by Trump's policies
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CITIC Securities Research Report pointed out that the United States and other countries have made phased progress in the recent stablecoin legislation. The research report believes that the Trump administration has three purposes for promoting cryptocurrency-related bills: helping families accumulate wealth and fulfilling campaign promises; promoting the expansion of the stablecoin market to alleviate the pressure of insufficient demand for US debt; strengthening the binding relationship between stablecoins and the US dollar and delaying the process of de-dollarization. Therefore, the formalization process of stablecoins is expected to continue. The expansion and development of the stablecoin market will be beneficial to the upward trend of cryptocurrencies in the medium and long term. However, the accelerated upward trend of cryptocurrencies may need to wait for Trump's policy certainty.

data.title: A whale traded against James Wynn and “picked up the corpse”, and the final profit was over $17 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember's monitoring, a whale opened a long position to "pick up corpses" after the James Wynn position was liquidated and forced to close, and sold out $17.08 million in profits two and a half hours ago.
He opened long positions on BTC and ETH twice after the James Wynn position was liquidated and forced to close, with the idea of ​​"picking up corpses": James Wynn's position was liquidated at 12 a.m. yesterday, and he opened a long position; James Wynn's position was liquidated and closed at 1 a.m. today, and he added a long position. However, as the price continued to fall, he chose to sell and close the position two and a half hours ago. As a result, he lost $17.08 million on this long position. After this profit-taking, his profit in the past 21 days has dropped from $30 million to $13 million.

data.title: OpenAI Challenges New York Times Lawsuit Over User Data Retention
data.description:
According to PANews, OpenAI has responded to a lawsuit filed by the New York Times, which demands the indefinite retention of all ChatGPT user chat records and API client content. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman criticized the lawsuit, stating that it significantly deviates from the company's commitment to user privacy. Altman emphasized that OpenAI has filed an appeal and will firmly oppose any demands that compromise user privacy.

The affected users include non-enterprise ChatGPT users and API users who have not signed a 'zero data retention' agreement. OpenAI has assured that the data will be encrypted and accessible only to the legal team.

data.title: Well-known investor Navarro comments on Trump and Musk: The two need each other, and it is wiser to give up the tax cut policy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Naval Ravikant, a well-known Silicon Valley angel investor who has invested in multiple encryption projects, posted on X: "Musk's position is principled. Trump's position is pragmatic. Current technology needs the support of Republicans. Republicans need future technological development. Give up the tax cuts, cut some spending, and get the bill passed." Musk then retweeted the tweet to express his support.

data.title: Uber CEO: Consider using stablecoin payments to reduce operating costs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Recently, at the Bloomberg Tech event, Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi said that the company is considering using stablecoins to reduce operating costs, and believes that the development of stablecoins is very promising, especially for global companies. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in June is 97.5%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CME's "Fed Watch": The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in June is 97.5%, and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 2.5%. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in July is 67.3%, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 32.0%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 0.8%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve's June and July Rate Decisions Predicted
data.description: According to Odaily, the CME's 'FedWatch' tool indicates a 97.5% probability that the Federal Reserve will maintain its current interest rates in June, with a 2.5% chance of a 25 basis point rate cut. For July, there is a 67.3% likelihood of rates remaining unchanged, a 32.0% chance of a cumulative 25 basis point cut, and a 0.8% probability of a cumulative 50 basis point reduction.

data.title: Investment tycoon Bill Ackman: Support Trump and Musk, both benefit if they work together, but both suffer if they separate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bill Ackman, investment tycoon and CEO of Pershing Square, said on social media that he supports US President Trump and Musk. He believes that for the benefit of the United States, they should coexist peacefully. People are stronger together than apart. (Jinshi)

data.title: US House Committee sets June 10 markup for CLARITY Act
data.description:
The US House Financial Services Committee announced today it will conduct a markup on the CLARITY Act on June 10. This is a great development on the path to regulated digital assets in the US. The bill aims to lay down a comprehensive set of rules for the growing world of cryptocurrencies. With bipartisan support […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/clarity-act-markup-set-for-june-10/

data.title: Trump personally admitted: There is no chance of a ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine, let them continue fighting!
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump admitted during a meeting with German Chancellor Merz that neither Russia nor Ukraine is ready for peace talks and mediation has failed. He revealed that Putin plans to launch a large-scale offensive against Ukraine in retaliation for the Ukrainian army's attack on the Russian air base. Although the Trump administration has tried to promote peace by repairing US-Russia relations and reducing aid to Ukraine, Putin has not shown any willingness to accept Ukraine's conditions. Trump warned that if the conflict continues, both sides may face US sanctions, while hinting that even if the war continues, they will cooperate with Moscow on the Iranian nuclear issue. Jeffrey Edmonds, a Department of Defense official in charge of Russian affairs during the Biden administration, bluntly stated, "Trump is tantamount to surrendering. Now the key is whether he will continue to maintain aid to Ukraine, even if it is symbolic." (Jinshi)
